headline: Wells Fargo (WFC) Could Be a Great Choice
summary: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Wells Fargo (WFC) have what it takes? Let's find out.

headline: Fed proposes easing capital rules for major banks
summary: The Federal Reserve has unveiled new proposals to ease capital rules for major banks. Yahoo Finance Senior Fed Reporter Jennifer Schonberger comes on the program to highlight the new banking regulation proposals under the Basel III Endgame guidelines.

raw.headline: Fed proposes easing capital rules for major banks
raw.summary: The Federal Reserve has unveiled new proposals to ease capital rules for major banks. Yahoo Finance Senior Fed Reporter Jennifer Schonberger comes on the program to highlight the new banking regulation proposals under the Basel III Endgame guidelines.

headline: Fed Keeps Rates Steady Amid Rising Inflation: What it Means for Banks
summary: JPM, BAC, C, WFC & KEY slide as the Fed holds rates at 3.5-3.75% and flags higher inflation, signaling a tough near-term outlook for banks' financial performance.

raw.headline: Fed Keeps Rates Steady Amid Rising Inflation: What it Means for Banks
raw.summary: JPM, BAC, C, WFC & KEY slide as the Fed holds rates at 3.5-3.75% and flags higher inflation, signaling a tough near-term outlook for banks' financial performance.

headline: Trump signals DOJ should continue Powell probe, complicating Warsh Fed nom
summary: Powell has accused the DOJ of investigating him in retaliation for his refusal to lower interest rates as much or as quickly as Trump has demanded.

raw.headline: Trump signals DOJ should continue Powell probe, complicating Warsh Fed nom
raw.summary: Powell has accused the DOJ of investigating him in retaliation for his refusal to lower interest rates as much or as quickly as Trump has demanded.

headline: The Iran war is threatening supply of a little-thought-of resource — helium. What it means for markets
summary: Supply allocations are being set by who needs the gas the most. Semiconductors are at the "top of the pecking order," said helium consultant Phil Kornbluth.

raw.headline: The Iran war is threatening supply of a little-thought-of resource — helium. What it means for markets
raw.summary: Supply allocations are being set by who needs the gas the most. Semiconductors are at the "top of the pecking order," said helium consultant Phil Kornbluth.

headline: Micron CEO says it can't deliver enough memory to key customers after blowout earnings
summary: Micron stock is up more than 350% in the past year thanks to a memory supply shortage driven by surging demand for Nvidia's AI chips.
